401.description: Unauthorized: Your API key is wrong.

403.description: Forbidden: You do not have access rights to the content. Unlike 401, your identity is known to the server.

404.description: NotFound: When a non-existent endpoint or resource is requested (bad URL or requested data was not found).

304.description: NotModified: Used when HTTP caching headers are in play. Only sent in response to If-Modified-Since headers.

406.description: NotAcceptable: If incorrect Accept header was provided as part of the request. Accept header must be 'application/json'.

409.description: Conflict: When the request is well-formed and valid, but conflicts with the current resource state in a way that prevents processing.

429.description: TooManyRequests: When a request is rejected due to rate limits.

500.description: InternalServerError: Used for internal errors. No details are provided to clients for security reasons. Please contact us at help@collective2.com if you see this.

503.description: ServiceUnavailable: We're temporarily offline for maintenance. Please try again later.

get.description: Search profiles using any field combination. Partial matches will be returned. Paginated endpoint. Only Admins, Geo and White-Label Admins can access this endpoint. If you're a GeoSite admin, you will see all your GeoSite members including your WhiteLabel members. If you're a WhiteLabel admin, you will see your WhiteLabel members, but not other GeoSite members. If you're neither, you will get a 403 error.

parameters.name: CountryCode
parameters.description: The person's country code. Not case-sensitive. (optional) See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2

parameters.name: DivisionCode
parameters.description: The person's subdivision (e.g. provinces or states). Not case-sensitive. (optional) See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2

parameters.name: IPAddress
parameters.description: The person's last known IP address (optional)

personId.description: The PersonId assigned to the AccessKey

role.description: The Role assigned to the AccessKey

createDate.description: The UTC DateTime when the key was created

deleteDate.description: The UTC DateTime when the key was deleted

comment.description: A user comment about the key

divisionCode.description: The person's division (usually the state) code

authenticatedDate.description: When the Account was Authenticated. Some broker connections (e.g. CQG, Rithmic, ETNA, ORBIS, StoneX, Tradovate, TransACT) require the broker to approve the account, while others (e.g. IB) don't, in which case the date will be when the client setup Autotrading.  NULL if never approved by the broker and it is a broker that requires account approval

totalDataDays.description: The total number of days where we have data

currency.description: The base currency of the account

startNAV.description: The Start NAV of the report

endNAV.description: The End NAV of the report

deposits.description: The total deposits in the account during the report period

withdrawals.description: The total withdrawals in the account during the report period

return1Month.description: 1 month percent return for the account

return3Month.description: 3 month percent return for the account

return12Month.description: 12 month percent return for the account. This will be annualized if there is less than 12 months of data available

returnEntirePeriod.description: Percent return for the entire specified period

csrf.description: The CSRF to be used by the White Label Site. Only send in response when Person was created by a White Label Site admin

startingCapital.description: (Optional) The starting capital. Must be set when Account is not specified, ignored when Account is specified

addedDate.description: The UTC date when the record was created

addedByPersonId.description: The PersonId who approved the account

startDate.description: UTC Date when the person setup Autotrading for the Strategy

lastModified.description: UTC Date when the person last modified the Autotrade settings for the Strategy

connectionName.description: The Autotrade name to show clients

fullSymbol.description: The full native C2 symbol e.g. BSRR2121Q22.5

underlying.description: Option Underlying symbol. Read-only value sent in responses. It is ignored in requests.

expiry.description: Option expiry. Format is 'May21'. Read-only value sent in responses. It is ignored in requests.

putOrCall.description: Option 'put' or 'call'. Read-only value sent in responses. It is ignored in requests.

strikePrice.description: Option strike price. Read-only value sent in responses. It is ignored in requests.

description.description: (optional) Instrument description. Read-only value sent in responses. It is ignored in requests.

startDate.description: UTC Date when the person setup Autotrading for the Strategy

symbol.description: The exchange root symbol e.g. AAPL

securityExchange.description: The MIC Exchange code. Set to DEFAULT for stocks, forex & options. For Futures, valid values are: XCME, XEUR, XICE, XLIF, XNYB, XNYM, XASX, XCBF, XCBT, XCEC, XKBT, XSES. See details at http://www.iso15022.org/MIC/homepageMIC.htm

maturityMonthYear.description: The MaturityMonthYear e.g. '202503' (March 2025), or if the contract requires a day: '20210521' (May 21, 2025)

putOrCall.description: The Option PutOrCall e.g. 0 = Put, 1 = Call

strikePrice.description: The ISO Option Strike Price. Zero means none

priceMultiplier.description: The multiplier to apply to the Exchange price to get the C2-formatted price. Read-only value sent in responses. It is ignored in requests.

operator.description: The logical operation to perform. Must be one of: > >= = <> < <=

openDate.description: DateTime when the trade was opened

closeDate.description: DateTime when the trade was closed

avgOpenFillPrice.description: The volume-weighted average opening fill price (VWAP)

avgCloseFillPrice.description: The volume-weighted average closing fill price (VWAP)

profitLoss.description: The net profit or loss of the trade

commission.description: The commission included in the ProfitLoss

maxDrawdown.description: The unrealized currency loss when the maximum peak-to-valley drawdown occurred for this trade

maxDrawdown_DateCalculated.description: The timestamp when this maximum peak-to-valley drawdown was calculated in New York time zone

maxDrawdown_WorstPrice.description: The worst price during the peak-to-valley drawdown for this trade

maxDrawdown_WorstPriceDate.description: The date in New York time zone when the worst price occurred during the peak-to-valley drawdown for this trade

maxDrawdown_StrategyEquity.description: The Strategy equity when the maximum peak-to-valley drawdown occurred for this trade

maxDrawdown_EntryPrice.description: The price at which the trade causing the maximum equity drop

maxDrawdown_OpenQuantity.description: The size of the trade (number of units) that initiated the maximum peak-to-valley drawdown

watchListId.description: The WatchList Id. Required except when ModificationAction=ADD and ModificationSource=LIST

modificationSource.description: The Type of list to modify. Valid values are 'LIST' (for the whole watchlist), 'MEMBER' (for the list items)

modificationAction.description: The change to make. Valid values are: ADD, DELETE

strategyId.description: The Strategy Id. Only required when ModificationSource=MEMBER

watchListName.description: The name of the watchlist. Only required when ModificationAction=ADD and ModificationSource=LIST

initial.description: Upfront amount needed to trade the instrument

maintenance.description: Minimum account balance required to keep the position open

id.description: The row ID. Read-only. Only present in response

orderId.description: The OrderId. Only required in NewAutotradeOrder and ReplaceAutotradeOrder endpoints

strategyName.description: The C2 Strategy name. Read-only. Only present in response

signalId.description: Only required in ReplaceAutotradeOrder endpoint. The C2 SignalId

openClose.description: Only required in ReplaceAutotradeOrder endpoint. 'O' = Open, 'C' = Close

tif.description: The time in force. 0 = Day, 1 = Good Till Cancel (GTC)

profitTarget.description: Only available in NewStrategyOrder endpoint. The C2-formatted Price at which to place a exit conditional order

stopLoss.description: Only available in NewStrategyOrder endpoint. The C2-formatted Price at which to place a exit conditional order

doNotCreateOCAGroup.description: Only available in NewStrategyOrder endpoint. Default is false. Used to indicate the ProfitTarget and StopLoss orders should not be added to a OCA group. Each exit order will be managed separately

cancelReplaceSignalId.description: Used to specify that this order replaces another

parentSignalId.description: Used to specify that this order is conditional (a child) on another

parkedUntilDate.description: The New-York date/time when the signal should be released. Applies only to Strategy signals

doNotSyncToOpen.description: Used to indicate this order should not be synched in the brokerage account. Only applies to Opening non-market orders

rejectMessage.description: The order rejection message. Only available in response when OrderStatus = '8' (Rejected)

id.description: The row ID. Read-only. Only present in response

orderId.description: The OrderId. Only required in NewAutotradeOrder and ReplaceAutotradeOrder endpoints

strategyName.description: The C2 Strategy name. Read-only. Only present in response

signalId.description: Only required in ReplaceAutotradeOrder endpoint. The C2 SignalId

openClose.description: Only required in ReplaceAutotradeOrder endpoint. 'O' = Open, 'C' = Close

tif.description: The time in force. 0 = Day, 1 = Good Till Cancel (GTC)

profitTarget.description: Only available in NewStrategyOrder endpoint. The C2-formatted Price at which to place a exit conditional order

stopLoss.description: Only available in NewStrategyOrder endpoint. The C2-formatted Price at which to place a exit conditional order

doNotCreateOCAGroup.description: Only available in NewStrategyOrder endpoint. Default is false. Used to indicate the ProfitTarget and StopLoss orders should not be added to a OCA group. Each exit order will be managed separately

cancelReplaceSignalId.description: Used to specify that this order replaces another

parentSignalId.description: Used to specify that this order is conditional (a child) on another

parkedUntilDate.description: The New-York date/time when the signal should be released. Applies only to Strategy signals

doNotSyncToOpen.description: Used to indicate this order should not be synched in the brokerage account. Only applies to Opening non-market orders

rejectMessage.description: The order rejection message. Only available in response when OrderStatus = '8' (Rejected)

orderStatus.description: 'A' = PendingNew, '0' = Working, '1' = Partially filled, '2' = Filled, '4' = Canceled, '5' = Replaced, '6' = Pending Cancel, '8' = Rejected, 'C' = Expired, 'E' = Pending Replace

avgFillPrice.description: The average fill price, if FilledQuantity > 0

postedDate.description: UTC DateTime when the order was posted

signalType.description: The type of signal. 1 = StrategySignal, 4 = ManualSignal, 5 = StrategySignalManualOverride, 6 = AutoStopLoss

info.description: Detailed information about the order, if available

email.description: The person's email. This is also the username when logging in to C2

isPhoneVerified.description: True if the the person's telephone is verified

divisionCode.description: The person's division (usually the state) code

created.description: The UTC date when the person was created

lastLoggedIn.description: The UTC date when the person last logged in

approvedAccounts.description: The list of approved brokerage accounts for this person

isManager.description: True if the the person is a strategy manager

isInvestor.description: True if the the person is a strategy investor

isGeoSiteAdmin.description: True if the the person is a GeoSite administrator

quantity.description: The net signed position quantity. Short positions will be negative.
The net signed position quantity. Short positions will be negative.

openedDate.description: UTC DateTime when the position was opened

errorCode.description: The C2 error code. Please see https://api-docs.collective2.com/guides/error-codes#c2-errors.

ResponseError.description: Error information pertaining to a particular named field. Used for returning multiple field validation errors.

errorCode.description: The HTTP error code. Please see https://api-docs.collective2.com/guides/error-codes#http-errors.

message.description: The human-readable meaning of the ErrorCode.

isAutotradeEnabled.description: Set to TRUE if you want to enable the account for Autotrade. The StartAutotrade endpoint will automatically enable this setting. It may be disabled if your account is delinked by the broker, or if we detect rare unexpected activity in your account such as a margin call, pattern day trader, account becomes restricted by the broker, etc.

isAutoSyncEnabled.description: Set to TRUE if you want to enable or disable AutoSync for the account. AutoSync automatically gets disabled whenever an external (i.e. non-C2) order is executed in the account.

positions.description: The list of positions that must exist in the strategy. Quantity must be non-zero. To close a position, simply omit it from the Positions array. Sending an empty Positions array will close all positions.

The list of positions that must exist in the strategy. Quantity must be non-zero. To close a position, simply omit it from the Positions array. Sending an empty Positions array will close all positions.

exitSignalsOCAGroupId.description: The StopLossSignalId and ProfitTargetSignalId OCA (One-Cancels-All) group

parkedUntilDate.description: The New-York date/time when the signal should be released

orderStatus.description: 'A' = PendingNew, '0' = Working, '1' = Partially filled, '2' = Filled, '4' = Canceled, '5' = Replaced, '6' = Pending Cancel, '8' = Rejected, 'C' = Expired, 'E' = Pending Replace

tif.description: The time in force. 0 = Day, 1 = Good Till Cancel (GTC)

avgFillPrice.description: The average fill price, if FilledQuantity > 0

postedDate.description: UTC DateTime when the order was posted

rejectMessage.description: The signal rejection message. Only available in response when OrderStatus = '8' (Rejected)

startDate.description: UTC Date when the person started SIM for the Strategy

endDate.description: UTC Date when the person stopped SIM for the Strategy

scalingFactor.description: The % scaling factor. e.g. 2 means 2x the strategy quantities

scalingPercentage.description: The Autotrade Scaling factor. e.g. Enter 105 for 105%

futuresEnabled.description: (optional) TRUE to enable the Futures asset class when autotrading this strategy. Default is FALSE

maxFutures.description: (optional) Set a maximum number of contracts to hold in a position for this strategy

forexEnabled.description: (optional) TRUE to enable autotrading Forex for this strategy. Default is FALSE

maxForex.description: (optional) Set a maximum number of units (each unit on C2 is 1000 currency units) to hold in a position for this strategy

stocksEnabled.description: (optional) TRUE to enable autotrading Stocks for this strategy. Default is FALSE

maxStocksDollars.description: (optional) Set a maximum number of dollars to hold in a position for this strategy (no decimals)

optionsEnabled.description: (optional) TRUE to enable autotrading Options for this strategy. Default is FALSE

shortOptionsEnabled.description: (optional) TRUE to enable the shorting of Options when autotrading this strategy. Default is FALSE

maxOptions.description: (optional) Set a maximum number of contracts to hold in a position for this strategy

doNotJoinCurrentSystemPositions.description: (optional) TRUE to prevent joining currently open positions in the strategy. Only applies to new Autotrade setups: this setting must not be set when modifing an existing Autotrade setup.

autoStopLoss.description: (optional) Dollar value of the automated stop loss which will rest in addition to the strategy stop loss orders

accountUserName.description: (optional) The Brokerage account username. Only needed for specific Brokers, please enquire with support at help@collective2.com

accountPassword.description: (optional) The Brokerage account password. Only needed for specific Brokers, please enquire with support at help@collective2.com

isAlive.description: TRUE if the Strategy is alive

isPrivate.description: TRUE if the Strategy is a test or private strategy

startDate.description: UTC Date of when the Strategy was created

securityTypesEnabled.description: List of all SecurityTypes enabled for trading in the strategy

monthlyCost.description: Cost of Strategy lease per month

whiteLabelSiteId.description: The Strategy Owner's White Label Site Id

isAlive.description: TRUE if the Strategy is alive

startDate.description: UTC Date of when the Strategy was created

primarySecurityTypes.description: Primary asset class traded e.g. Stocks, Options, Forex, Futures

securityTypesEnabled.description: List of all SecurityTypes enabled for trading in the strategy

monthlyCost.description: Cost of Strategy lease per month

suggestedCapital.description: The suggested capital to invest in the Strategy

lastModified.description: UTC Date of when the Strategy was last modified

isTradeOwnSystem.description: TRUE if Strategy owner Trades his Own Strategy

aum.description: The total USD assets under management

auM_NumberOfAccounts.description: The number of accounts used in the AUM calculation

returnLabel.description: The total Strategy return label which explains the Return calculation

equity.description: The current open profits (or open losses) in the positions the strategy is currently holding

marginUsed.description: The amount of collateral the strategy needs to put up to hold the positions it holds. For futures, this is specified per contract by the exchange; for stocks it's the standard margin formula

ageInDays.description: Number of days the Strategy traded

numMonths.description: The total number of months for the strategy

winMonthsInUI.description: The number of profitable months as shown on the C2 UI

maxDrawdown.description: The % of maximum peak-to-valley historical drawdown

maxDrawdownDays.description: The number of days of the maximum peak-to-valley historical drawdown

maxDrawdownStartDate.description: The maximum drawdown start date YYYYMMDD

maxDrawdownEndDate.description: The maximum drawdown end date YYYYMMDD

avgWinDollars.description: The average Strategy winning trade in dollars

avgLossDollars.description: The average Strategy losing trade in dollars

avgTradeDuration.description: The average number of trading days that a position is held

correlationSP500.description: The Correlation to the S&P 500 during strategy life

sP500Return.description: The cumulative % return of the SP500 during strategy life

returnVsSP500.description: The % return of the strategy - Return of SP500 % (cumulative)

avgLeverage.description: The average leverage used by the Strategy

maxLeverage.description: The max leverage used by the Strategy

correlationToSP500.description: The strategy correlation to the SP500

sharpe.description: The Sharpe ratio tells us whether a portfolio's returns are due to smart investment decisions or a result of excess risk

startDate.description: UTC Date of when the Strategy was created

securityTypesEnabled.description: List of all SecurityTypes enabled for trading in the strategy

monthlyCost.description: Cost of Strategy lease per month

monthlyResults.description: Monthly and Yearly stats for the strategy

monthName.description: The English name of the month

return.description: The return % of the month or year (see IsAnnual property)

isAnnual.description: True if the Return is the annual ROI for the Year

isStrategyOwner.description: The PersonId is also the strategy owner

endDate.description: The strategy EndDate, if it was killed

isResale.description: True if the strategy is bing resold through this White Label Site Id

isSimulation.description: TRUE if the person is Autotrading as a simulation

isPaperTrade.description: TRUE if the person is Autotrading in a PaperTrade account

isAlive.description: TRUE if the subscription is active

startDate.description: UTC Date when the subscription started

endDate.description: UTC Date when the subscription ended

startDate.description: The UTC start date of the subscription

endDate.description: The UTC end date of the subscription

isRecurring.description: TRUE if the subscription automatically renews

pointValue.description: The value of a point (used with futures)

decimalPrecision.description: The decimal precision of the price (used with futures)

success.description: TRUE if operation was successful for the strategy

reason.description: Will contain a reason if operation was not successful

reasonCode.description: Will contain the reason HTTP code if operation was not successful

bearerAuth.description: Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. e.g. 'Bearer myAPIkey'. See https://swagger.io/docs/specification/v3_0/authentication/bearer-authentication/
